canStopOnADime: Ability to stop movement precisely (e.g. for tight landings).
canTrivialMidAirMorph: Basic mid-air morph with no strict timing.
canUseGrapple: Use Grapple Beam to swing and reach areas.
canTurnaroundSpinJump: Turn around during a spin jump.
canUseEnemies: Use enemies as platforms or for damage boosts.
canTrivialUseFrozenEnemies: Stand or bounce on frozen enemies with simple setup.
canEscapeEnemyGrab: Break out of enemy grab (e.g. Etecoon).
canDash: Use Speed Booster to run at full speed.
canHeatRun: Run through heated rooms without Varia long enough for the strat.
canMidAirMorph: Morph in mid-air (e.g. to clear one-block gaps).
canWalljump: Wall jump off walls to gain height or change direction.
canUseFrozenEnemies: Use frozen enemies as platforms or for tricks.
canShinespark: Store Speed Booster charge and shinespark in a direction.
canSuitlessMaridia: Traverse Maridia without Gravity Suit (with specific strats).
canSpaceJumpWaterBounce: Space Jump in water to bounce and maintain height.
canCrouchJump: Crouch jump to reach higher from a crouch.
canGravityJump: Jump effectively in high gravity (e.g. underwater).
canSpringBallJumpMidAir: Spring Ball jump while in morph, mid-air.
canCarefulJump: Short hop or controlled jump to avoid obstacles.
canPreciseWalljump: Wall jump with precise placement or timing.
canConsecutiveWalljump: Chain multiple wall jumps (e.g. in a shaft).
canBombHorizontally: Place bombs in morph to move or break blocks horizontally.
canIBJ: Infinite Bomb Jump: chain bomb jumps to gain height indefinitely.
canPseudoScrew: Pseudo Screw Attack–style damage or movement.
canSpeedyJump: Jump that preserves or uses speed (e.g. from run).
canAwakenZebes: Trigger Zebes awakening / event flags as required.
canSuitlessLavaDive: Enter or cross lava without Varia (with specific strats).
canSunkenTileWideWallClimb: Wall climb using sunken tile or wide wall setup.
canCrossRoomJumpIntoWater: Cross-room jump that ends in water.
canPlayInSand: Move or trick in sand (e.g. Maridia sand).
canManageReserves: Use reserve tanks intentionally (e.g. for damage boost).
canMoonwalk: Moonwalk: run backward at full speed.
canResetFallSpeed: Reset fall speed (e.g. with morph or action).
canWallJumpInstantMorph: Morph immediately out of a wall jump.
canLateralMidAirMorph: Mid-air morph with lateral movement or positioning.
canMockball: Mockball: morph in mid-air to keep horizontal speed and pass one-block gaps.
canBufferedMomentumConservingTurnaround: Turn around while conserving momentum using buffered inputs.

canMorphTurnaround: Turn around while in morph ball.
canUseIFrames: Use invincibility frames from damage or other sources.

canMochtroidIceClimb: Climb using Mochtroid freeze or ice.

canDodgeWhileShooting: Dodge enemies or hazards while shooting.
canHitbox: Use precise hitbox knowledge (e.g. to avoid or trigger).

canGateGlitch: Gate glitch: pass through gate or door with glitch.

can4HighMidAirMorph: Mid-air morph from a 4-block-high (or similar) fall.
